mapper.select: select model_id, username, age, total_month, visit_per_week, aver_exercise, pt_yn, group_yn, time_cong, last_days, contract_type from "h_model_data" where username = #{username}
select model_id, username, age, total_month, visit_per_week, aver_exercise, pt_yn, group_yn, time_cong, last_days, contract_type from "h_model_data"
mapper.insert: insert into "h_model_data" ( username, age, total_month, visit_per_week, aver_exercise, pt_yn, group_yn, time_cong, last_days, contract_type ) values ( #{username}, #{age}, #{totalMonth}, #{visitPerWeek}, #{averExercise}, #{ptYn}, #{groupYn}, #{timeCong}, #{lastDays}, #{contractType} ) on conflict (username) do update set age = excluded.age, total_month = excluded.total_month, visit_per_week = excluded.visit_per_week, aver_exercise = excluded.aver_exercise, pt_yn = excluded.pt_yn, group_yn = excluded.group_yn, time_cong = excluded.time_cong, last_days = excluded.last_days, contract_type = excluded.contract_type

insert into "h_model_data" ( username, age, total_month, visit_per_week, aver_exercise, pt_yn, group_yn, time_cong, last_days, contract_type ) values
( #{item.username}, #{item.age}, #{item.totalMonth}, #{item.visitPerWeek}, #{item.averExercise}, #{item.ptYn}, #{item.groupYn}, #{item.timeCong}, #{item.lastDays}, #{item.contractType} )
on conflict (username) do update set age = excluded.age, total_month = excluded.total_month, visit_per_week = excluded.visit_per_week, aver_exercise = excluded.aver_exercise, pt_yn = excluded.pt_yn, group_yn = excluded.group_yn, time_cong = excluded.time_cong, last_days = excluded.last_days, contract_type = excluded.contract_type
